phase14.1.phaseName: Automation tasks, 'Pixelbrain' AI Agents and MCP
phase14.1.description: Automation tasks, Create 'Pixelbrain' project (AI Agents and MCP) and connect it to TheGame
deliverables: Develop 'Pixelbrain', a 'Orchestrator Agent' to Manage a Set of 'AI Agents'
Define all the AI Agents Roles and Responsabilities
Implement the M2M Authentication between TheGame and Pixelbrain
Implement Monthly Close Automation Task
Implement automated monthly summary generation and analysis based on archive data (post Monthly Close)
Create one AI Agent for Data Integrity Validation that checks: Link consistency across all entity relationships
The Agent must checkCollected/Sold status consistency, Month index accuracy, Archive snapshot completeness

phase14.2.phaseName: Maps and Accounts Sections, UI and Gameplay
phase14.2.description: Complete Maps and Accounts Sections, Improve UI and Gameplay (Player and Characters)
deliverables: Make the Map and Sites visible with GoogleMap
Define if to Create Events Tab in the Control Room
Connect Events to the system and Manage Events, tracking Tasks and Items sales in a specific timeframe
Events temporarily take over regular workflow during time-bound campaigns (e.g. Special Week Sale)
JungleCoins and its equivalent (Usd) Produced, visible in the Dashboard and Player Section
Personal Finances well conected to Player Points and Personal Earnings
Accounts Section, Accounts Modal, for Accounts Managment (only Founder)
Account Creation Process, Accounts Section UI improvements
Network Sales System
Basic Badges and Achievements systems improved
Personas to Characters Rollback, so Personas is a feature of Characters
Refactor the Authentication System with the IAM Service
Fix the Month Selector to show all the months with data (Archive + Summary)
Clean ad Update All the Spread Documentation

system.description: Foundation with proper enums, entities, and data flow

dashboards.description: Dashboard system for tracking key bussiness metrics and progress

finances.description: Implemented with Company/Personal split and In-Game Currency

inventories.description: Unified Stock management at different Sites

maps.description: Basic Sites System and World Map

dataCenter.description: Central repository for Logs, tracking Status changes

archive.description: Basic Archive system for storing full entities historical data

accounts.description: Accounts section with account management (create/edit/delete accounts and link to characters)

pixelbrain.description: Basic MCP and AI Agents System

features: Replace Placeholder with Google Map working API
Integrate with Site and Location System
